title: A bill to designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 107 North Hoyne Avenue in Fritch, Texas, as the "Chief Zeb Smith Post Office".
plain_summary: This bill renames a post office building in Fritch, Texas. The post office is located at 107 North Hoyne Avenue. It will now be officially called the Chief Zeb Smith Post Office. This new name will be used in all government papers and documents about this building.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.

sections.title: Section 1  Chief Zeb Smith Post Office
sections.text: The United States Postal Service building located at one hundred seven North Hoyne Avenue in Fritch, Texas will now be called the Chief Zeb Smith Post Office. From now on, whenever any law, map, rule, document, paper, or other official record mentions this postal service building, it must use the name Chief Zeb Smith Post Office instead of any other name it might have had before.
